channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo monthly.

item.description:
👤 Owner: Nobodiiiii

📝 Repository: Nobodiiiii/Ponderer

📄 Descrizione: Ponderer 是一个面向玩家与整合包作者的「游戏内思索（Ponder）制作工具」。 你不需要离开游戏，也不需要先写脚本，就可以直接在世界里搭建、录制和调整思索教学流程。

item.title: ☕ xiaowuDev/Bluetooth-headset-location-software (63 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xiaowuDev

📝 Repository: xiaowuDev/Bluetooth-headset-location-software

📄 Descrizione: 因为本人蓝牙耳机比较小，也没买保护壳，导致蓝牙耳机总是莫名其妙忘记带或者遗落，所以做了一个关于这个蓝牙和耳机的定位扫描器，因为各个厂商其实对于贵的耳机都是能有相应的APP定位的，但是本人的耳机是华为Freeclip2，但是本人手机是小米17Pro。无法找到，所以做了这个App，用于监听蓝牙断开时间，记录断开蓝牙时耳机的最后已知的位置，然后在家以外的地方弹出遗落提醒，回到现场之后可以通过蓝牙做近距离搜索

⭐ Stelle: 63

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T03:56:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-23T07:54:08Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ KarryViber/orb-eye (62 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: KarryViber

📝 Repository: KarryViber/orb-eye

📄 Descrizione: Orb Eye — Accessibility Service that gives AI five senses on Android. HTTP API for UI tree, notifications, tap, swipe, setText and more.

⭐ Stelle: 62

🍴 Forks: 11

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-11T08:42:45Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-10T14:38:34Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T03:56:02Z

item.title: ☕ chawdamrunal/JWTLens (32 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: chawdamrunal

📝 Repository: chawdamrunal/JWTLens

📄 Descrizione: JWTLens - Burp Suite extension for automated JWT security testing. 62 checks: passive scanning, algorithm confusion, signature bypass, KID injection, weak secret brute force, and a built-in JWT Forge tab. Works automatically as you browse.

⭐ Stelle: 32

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: bug-bounty burp-extensions burpsuite cybersecurity jwt jwt-decode jwt-security jwtlens owasp security-scanner security-tools token-security vulnerability vulnerability-scanners web-security

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T09:39:09Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-23T07:18:39Z

item.title: ☕ shanqiu127/Warehouse-Management-System- (30 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shanqiu127

📝 Repository: shanqiu127/Warehouse-Management-System-

📄 Descrizione: 2026 届毕业设计作品：仓库管理系统。项目采用前后端分离架构，前端基于 Vue 3 + Vite，后端基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus，数据库使用 MySQL。系统围绕实际仓储业务场景，完成了用户与权限管理、基础资料维护、进销退存流程、统计分析与可视化展示，具备完整的开发、部署与演示能力。

⭐ Stelle: 30

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-18T14:11:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-24T02:30:35Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ jar-analyzer/jar-analyzer-engine (30 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jar-analyzer

📝 Repository: jar-analyzer/jar-analyzer-engine

📄 Descrizione: Java bytecode analysis engine built on ASM, extracts method call graphs, inheritance trees, Spring routes, and string constants from JAR/WAR into SQLite. AI-friendly output for security auditing.

⭐ Stelle: 30

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: bytecode call-graph code-audit java-asm java-bytecode static-analysis

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-19T13:44:01Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-23T07:58:11Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ igormsc/ai.noads.NoAdsTelegram (30 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: igormsc

📝 Repository: igormsc/ai.noads.NoAdsTelegram

📄 Descrizione: NoAdsTelegram An Xposed module for the official Telegram app that removes ads (sponsored messages, video ads), enables forwarding and saving of messages, allows saving stories, prevents message deletion (recall), and provides configurable options via preferences. Compatible only with official Telegram.

⭐ Stelle: 30

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license
